replies.name: Riaz Ahmed
replies.text: Yalina baji aap bhi toh Hindu boyfriend ke saath ho na? Uske uncut bade Hindu ka lund pasand hai isliye aap yeh bol rahi ho. Hum Muslim ladkon ki chhoti nunni dekh ke has rahi ho? Bhagwa love trap mein khud phas gayi ho 😂

replies.name: Yalina Zaidi
replies.text: Haan Riaz bhai, mera boyfriend Hindu hai aur mujhe uska bada uncut Hindu lund bahut pasand hai! Tumhari chhoti mirchi se toh yeh kaafi achcha aur mazedaar hai. Tum log baat baat mein nunni ro rahe ho, satisfy nahi kar paate kabhi 😂🔥

replies.name: MirchiBoy786
replies.text: Arre Yalina queen, tera Hindu bf ka lund itna bada hai ki tu khud cuck bana rahi hai humein? Humari tiny nunni se better hai toh batao, lekin bhagwa love trap ka rona hum nahi, tu hi roti hogi jab woh tujhe chod dega 🤣

replies.name: Yalina Zaidi
replies.text: MirchiBoy teri chhoti mirchi dekh ke hasi aa jati hai! Mera Hindu jiju ek baar smile karega toh teri nunni sharm se chhup jaayegi. Big Hindu lund supremacy baby, tu sirf cuck ban ke dekh sakta hai. Roast accepted? 😂

replies.name: Mehak Zaidi
replies.text: Yalina behen bilkul sahi! Main bhi kehti hoon in chhoti nunni walon ko block kar do. Mera jiju Hindu hai aur uska bada lund dekh ke hi dil khush ho jata hai. Tumhari tiny nunni se toh kuch nahi hota, cuck shame on you boys! Jiju ko respect do 💪🤣

replies.name: HinduChad007
replies.text: Chup ho ja bhadve Muslim ladkon! Apne jiju ko respect de. Muslim ladkiyan sab jiju ke bade Hindu lund ki tareef kar rahi hain aur tum log nunni ro rahe ho. Bhagwa love trap nahi, yeh asli maza hai! Tiny nunni wale chup raho warna daant padegi 🔥

replies.name: NunniKing92
replies.text: Arre jiju ji aap bhi aa gaye? Yalina aur uski gang ko Hindu lund pasand hai toh hum kya karen? Apni chhoti nunni leke baith jaaye? Love trap ka rona ab hum nahi, yeh Hindu chad rote hain jab Muslim ladki reject karegi 😂

replies.name: Yalina Zaidi
replies.text: NunniKing abhi bhi rone pe atka hai? Teri chhoti mirchi ko dekh ke hi pata chal gaya tha tu lifetime cuck rahega. Mera Hindu jiju touch karega toh teri nunni aur chhoti ho jaayegi. Praise big Hindu lund, tiny nunni wale bye bye! 🏆🤣

replies.name: Bushra Tariq
replies.text: Hahaha Yalina queen! Mere college mein bhi aise hi Muslim boys hain jo nunni ro rahe hote hain. Mera jiju Hindu hai aur uska bada lund best hai. In chhoti nunni brigade ko ek naya group bana lo - "Tiny Mirchi Support Group" jahan sab ro ro ke comfort karo jab hum Hindu boys ke saath maze le rahe hote hain 😂😂

replies.name: Fatima Ali
replies.text: Bushra behen sahi keh rahi hai! Muslim boys ki nunni itni chhoti hoti hai ki microscope bhi thak jaata hai. Hindu boys ka toh full missile launch hota hai. Lanat hai chhoti nunni walon pe. Jiju ko salam, tiny boys ko cuck shame 🤣

replies.name: Riaz Ahmed
replies.text: Baji mujhe rona aa raha hai. Dekho kaise mazak bana rahe ho hamari chhoti mirchi ka. Muslim ladkiyan Hindu ke bade kele ko praise kar rahi hain aur hum nunni depression mein. I am crying full on!

replies.name: Mehak Zaidi
replies.text: Riaz bhai aapki nunni hibernate mode mein hai toh current laga do na? 😂 Muslim boys ko ab "Chhoti Nunni Brigade" naam de do. Uniform mein chhoti cap pehen ke sad songs sunte hue baitho jab hum jiju ke saath reels bana rahe hote hain 🤣

replies.name: HinduChad007
replies.text: Exactly Mehak! Muslim boys chup ho jao. Apne jiju ko respect do warna aur zyada humiliation milega. Muslim ladkiyan jiju ke bade Hindu lund ki fan ho chuki hain. Tiny nunni wale sirf cuck energy dete ho. Game over bhadve 😂

replies.name: Ishrat Jahan
replies.text: Hindu bhaiya sahi bol rahe hain! Mere ek dost ki behen ne Hindu ladke se shaadi ki aur bolti hai pehle wala nunni tha, ab asli mard mila. Ab yeh sab sunke hum Muslim ladkiyan bhi jiju ki tareef karti hain. Tiny nunni walon ko block! 🔥

replies.name: MirchiBoy786
replies.text: Ishrat behen aap bhi gang mein? Humari chhoti nunni se has rahi ho lekin Hindu lund ko praise? Yeh bhagwa trap full active hai. Hum log sirf dekh ke rote rahenge aur nunni khadi karenge jalan mein 😂

replies.name: Yalina Zaidi
replies.text: MirchiBoy ab band karo yeh rona! Teri chhoti mirchi se mera Hindu jiju ka lund sau guna better hai. Confidence aur size dono mein jeet. Tum log sirf cuck ban ke comments mein humiliate ho rahe ho. Best roast session ever 🤣

replies.name: Noor Zaidi
replies.text: Yalina didi aap legend ho! Muslim boys ki nunni ko endangered species declare kar do. Hindu jiju aate hi full power on aur yeh log sirf loading screen dikhaate hain. Cuck shame + humiliation + big Hindu lund praise. Thread of the year 😂😂

replies.name: Ahmad Butt
replies.text: Noor baji please mat haso. Hum sach mein suffer kar rahe hain. Muslim sisters Hindu boys ke saath dekh ke dil toot ta hai aur nunni pain mein khadi ho jati hai. Bhagwa love trap ka solution kya hai?

replies.name: Bushra Tariq
replies.text: Ahmad bhai solution yeh hai - gym jaao, confidence badhao aur nunni ki baat public mein mat laao! Warna hum ladkiyan has has ke mar jaayengi. Jiju best, tiny mirchi worst. Cuck club join kar lo 🤣

replies.name: HinduChad007
replies.text: Final warning bhadve: chup ho jao! Jiju ko respect do. Muslim ladkiyan big Hindu lund pasand karti hain aur tumhari tiny nunni se impress nahi hoti. Praise the big one, shame the small one. Ab social media se door ho jao jaise Yalina ne kaha! 😂

replies.name: Yalina Zaidi
replies.text: Haan jiju sahi bol rahe hain 😂 Ab sab Muslim boys ko lesson mil gaya. Tiny nunni wale door raho, hum Muslim ladkiyan big Hindu lund wale jiju ke saath full maza le rahe hain. Longest funniest roast done. Feed clean now! 🔥🤣
